    • Archan Good News

      Since Archiarchy is for Gaia, and not fighting against anything, and since Archiarchy uses distinctions and thoughtware that originate beyond the edges of modern culture, all the astonishing Archan events and creations fly beneath modern culture's news radar.

      However, so much good is happening now - not 'good' as opposed to 'bad', but good as in thoughtful, inspiring, courageous, love-filled, inventive, and regenerative - that we cannot resist sharing it with you.

      Here you go! A bunch of really good stuff to indulge in!

      ARCHIARCHY

    • Archan Good News

      General Listing

      Pay It ForWORLD, from Lisa-Maria Goertz

      Born from a longing to create a channel through which regeneration and evolution can be valued as a currency in their own right. Where people can pay with regeneration.

      I made a website to start with and there is a second phase which I don't want to add now as I am scared it will be too complicated which is a Bank of Regeneration, where anybody can exchange their material or non-material value and where again the Gaian currency of Regeneration and Evolution is the central value. And this will need quite some work to create the platform and so on.

      The idea is that these acts of regeneration have tangible value so that changemakers can get on with doing what they want to do without having to think about how they are going to monetise their projects or fit into ridiculous modern culture boxes for EU grants etc that make things so narrow and regimented. To open a Money Loop, similar to Archiarchy River, but with Regeneration and Evolution actions.

      I want to keep pulling the rug out from assumptions, to not create something 'new' with my old culture. I want to create something truly regenerative and from next culture. How do I create something that is contexted in next culture using the tools, platforms, banking systems, money bills of modern culture and not lose my context?

      Another thing I would like possibilities about is how could we now, or in the future, connect this to Gaias? The Gaian currency being Gaias. One Gaia is equivalent to the work of planting one tree and caring for it for a year that it thrives.

      The current plan is to use the Possibility Lab coming up on Tenerife as a money initiation, doing the EHPs, and Memetic Engineering to change our thoughtware about money and see how it can evolve.

      The platform is called Pay it ForWORLD: <payitforworld.com>

      I always remember a conversation in Poland with 3 of us discussing the Gaian Constitution and I said I was scared of being stupid and Clinton Callahan said, "Let's all be in the Stupid Club together! It's much more fun!" Something in me shifted in that moment. I can still sense it now. I am grateful about you for helping me get out my own way!

      Love,

      Lisa-Maria

      Rage Club In The News! from Hannah Hirsch

      Dear US Village,

      Last week @dawaychouren @meredithwitt and I held an Intro to Rage Club at Earthdance, a contact improv community in western Massachusetts, where Joseph organized a week of events as part of the US Possibility Tour. Today @clark_rachel sent me these screenshots of Rage Club in the Hampshire Gazette! I celebrate how deeply people felt, and also the teamwork between me and Daway and Meredith (our first time holding space together). Multiple people came up to me afterward and asked how long we had been training together.

      I feel glad about the collaboration between Rage Club and other Gameworlds. @annechloedestremau in an article you wrote, “It might take 20, 30 or 40 years, but someday, there might just be Rage Club studios in every town as spaces of Empowerment, Love, Healing, Clarity and Care,” and I sense that vision is coming closer to fruition.

      Link: gazettenet.com/Rage-Club-July-3-62095949

      (Also see photos of article below: Rage Club helps channel anger into 'aliveness'

      Love,

      Hannah

      Creating a Gaian Constitution, from Aon Solarra

      If we look at the history of humankind, the main source of terrorism has been state terror (Think Stalin, Hitler, the Red Khmers etc.). Thus, protecting the public from the excesses of their rulers has always been a necessity and with the advent of digital surveillance, AI and robot armies the need is all the more pressing today.

      Other pressing reasons to rethink the foundation of society comes from population growth, overconsumption of resources, proliferation of dangerous technologies and an economic system that concentrates wealth in the wrong places. Unless these tendencies are controlled, the emergence of a high-tech authoritarian global regime is almost inevitable.

      Add to this the fundamental conflict between:

      • Modern culture, based in a materialistic, hierarchical and patriarchal worldview that considers the Earth a resource to exploit, and has money and power as its central values, and the emerging
      • Gaian Culture, based in a holistic, non-authoritarian, Archan worldview, that reveres the Earth, Gaia, as a cosmic being and has free will and creation as its central values.

      and the differences between the two paths of evolution of society could hardly be more extreme.

      We begin by creating hybrid (online/offline) events, that allow a core group to gather physically and include people all over the world to participate virtually. This group would dive into the different topics, hold space for healing the wounds of everyone participating and drafting proposals for the different part.

      My proposal is to articulate a general Preamble, 3 Principles, 5 Priorities, and 10 goals, in a brief and easily understandable document that groups all over the Earth can rally behind. You are invited to help.

      Link: <gaianconstitution.org>

      Link: <aonsolarra.com/creating-a-gaian-constitution>

      Link: <gaiaversity.com/gaianconstitution>

      Savory Institute Regenerative Agriculture with Hunter Lovins

      Bringing Holistic Land Management into Global Consciousness. What started as Alan Savory’s efforts has evolved today into a complex ecosystem of initiatives stewarded by a global cadre of changemakers. At Savory, we are revolutionizing agriculture and offering a proven path to the transformative wholeness upon which all of life depends. Watch Alan Savory's TED Talk here: youtube.com/watch?v=vpTHi7O66pI

      In Hunter Lovins interview, we unpack her blueprint for a just, regenerative economy, and hear why she’s co-launching COPx - a people-powered alternative to the UN climate talks. Hunter also shares stories from the field: scaling community-managed natural farming with 4 million smallholders in India, quadrupling yields in Zambia, and advising Gulf states on turning desert sands green. Along the way we talk about regenerative economics, the double-edged sword that is capitalism, 'global weirding', and how every plate she spins - finance, policy, ranching, activism - aims at one goal: tackling climate, water, and food crises all at once.

      Link: <savory.global/podcast-episodes/11-hunter-lovins>

      Additional episodes are here: <savory.global/podcast>

    • Good News Resources For You

      These resources can leverage and amplify you, either through them supporting you to upgrade your personal and Team effectiveness, or you supporting them to expand theirs.

      50 THOUGHTWARE UPGRADES

      This website provides 50 central thoughtware upgrades to Archiarchy. The key to thoughtware upgrades is remembering that each upgrade involves one or more experiential Liquid States as your current thoughtware changes around into a new Inner Structure. If there is no Liquid State, there is no upgrade.

      Link: <50thoughtwareupgrades.mystrikingly.com>

      AKASHINGA

      The Akashinga Rangers are part of an innovative and effective programme that harnesses the power of the local community to combat poaching. Damien Mander — a former Australian special forces soldier — founded the Akashinga Rangers in 2017, a team of anti-poaching rangers made up entirely of women who stand up for African wildlife. As the rangers train and learn how to protect ecosystems, they become stewards of these landscapes and wildlife while developing personal and financial security and elevating their communities. Akashinga's strategic approach doesn’t simply provide guns to stop poachers. Instead, we call for community involvement and support. If communities could recognise the benefits of protecting and preserving animals and their habitats, poaching could die out without the need for armed confrontations. Akashinga embraces an innovative, effective approach to conservation that empowers women and communities while protecting wildlife and habitats.

      You can view Akashinga: the brave ones, a short film by National Geographic produced by James Cameron HERE.

      Link: <akashinga.org>

      ARCHIARCHY ARTABANA

      Artabana is a global network of small self-governing health-support groups. We meet regularly as local health clubs with 5-20 members of all ages, creating trust, and sharing clarity, possibility, and love, to maximize our physical, mental, emotional, energetic and archetypal health. We benevolently pool finances for medical emergencies.

      Each Artabana Circle is unique. The uniqueness of Archiarchy Artabana is defined as a specific Context. A Context is the set of Distinctions, Thoughtmaps, Tools, Thoughtware, and Processes out of which a Gameworld emerges.

      Archiarchy Artabana is a collaborative, Winning-Happening, Gaian Gameworld for Healing and Transformation – part of the global Artabana Gameworld. Our aim is to support each Archiarchy Artabana member on their Path of preparing to jack-in to their Archetypal Lineage, and then to deliver their services to the village.

      Link: <archiarchyartabana.mystrikingly.com>

      ARCHIARCHY INVENTION CENTERS (AIC)

      Buckminster Fuller declared: “You do not change things by fighting against the existing gameworlds. You change things by cavitating and inhabiting new gameworlds that make the existing gameworlds irrelevant.”

      It is the task of the youth to build humanity's new gameworlds. The future is being created at Archiarchy Invention Centers. If you attend a university and receive a B.S., M.S., or even Ph.D., what have you done? You have learned to duplicate what is already proven to exterminate life on Earth 100 times faster than when the Chicxulub asteroid crashed into the Yucutan sixty-six-million years ago.

      The fundamental difference between AICs and universities is that AICs don't teach you anything. Instead, they require that you invent a new path for human culture on Earth. It is not about fitting in to an already existing culture, but rather to build out and inhabit a not yet existing culture, a culture that is regenerative.

      Regenerative culture is very different from a green consumption, recycling conscious, sustainable development, electric car culture which aims to optimize shareholder value.

      Regenerative culture is Earth centric, not profit centric.

      Archiarchy Invention Centers are a 'soft landing' platform for when your worldview crashes against reality and you are ready to take Radical Responsibility for using human potentials and group intelligence to invent a regenerative society based on nonmaterial economics. You will be upagrading your thoughtware.

      Your first new skillset will be learning to Cavitate and Spacehold the invention of new Archiarchy Invention Centers.

      Link: <archiarchyinventioncenters.mystrikingly.com>

      ARCHIARCHY KIVA TEAM - Interest-Free Microloans

      Join the Archiarchy Kiva Team: kiva.org/invitedto/archiarchy_kiva/by/annechlo2830

      Kiva.org is a personal online savings account where you can change someone's life by giving them a no-interest loan of as little as $25.

      'Archiarchy Kiva' is the customized Kiva Lending Team that is Contexted in next culture - Archiarchy - the culture that is naturally emerging now that Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course. Together we have made more than $10,000 in no-interest microloans and helped hundreds of edgeworkers - mostly Asian women - improve their lives. You can be on our Team!

      Link: <archiarchykiva.mystrikingly.com>

      ARCHIARCHY RIVER - Intra-Archan Project Loans

      Archiarchy River (the “River”) serves to facilitate the flow of members’ savings to projects that directly or indirectly contribute to creating Next Culture, Archiarchy.

      The result is that instead of savings being stored as potential energy in ‘dams’ and used by banks, the funds constantly flow regeneratively as a 'river' through Next Culture projects.

      In addition, the River serves as a bridge from Modern Culture economy thoughtware to Archan economy thoughtware. The main forum for this inner transformation are the fortnightly meetings where Nonmaterial Value is offered and requested, such as Clarity, Possibility, Feedback, Possibility Coaching, Gameworld Consulting, Distinctions, Dangerous Questions, and Emotional Healing Processes (EHP).

      Link: <archiarchyriver.mystrikingly.com>

      BRIDGEHOUSE - Synergetic Education & Temporary Community

      ...have you ever dreamed of switching over to a life that makes sense?

      Bridgehouse is an Archiarchy life-skills training environment. We are convinced that you have a piece of the puzzle of how to create and inhabit regenerative human cultures on Earth. One purpose of Bridgehouse is to clarify, amplify, and launch your piece of the puzzle as your Nonmaterial Value service to the Village.

      Another purpose of Bridgehouse is to empower each other to become Spaceholders for creating more Bridgehouses.

      A further, and perhaps even more fundamental purpose of Bridgehouse has been revealing itself empirically as we gain more experience in Cavitating, Holding, and Navigating Bridgehouse Spaces. This purpose is to 'bridge people out of the Matrix,' using the term 'the matrix' as defined in the film of the same name: The Matrix.

      In particular we think of the scenes where Neo chooses the 'Red Pill' and Morpheus and Trinity pull him through into 'the real world'. After a while, Neo lies on his back in what appears to be a large glass aquarium. He is completely pinned with some kind of giant acupuncture needles.

      Neo asks, "Why do my eyes hurt?"

      Morpheus replies, "You never used them before."

      In Bridgehouse, people ask, "Why does my heart ache?"

      We say, "Because you never let it speak before."

      Through Process after Process, discovery after discovery, Bridgehouse residents help each other let go of Assumptions, Expectations, Conclusions, and Projections which you wove deeply into a Survival Strategy that does not work anymore, because you no longer live in the Capitalistic Patriarchal Empire. You live in Archiarchy, in a Bridgehouse, with other escapees and completely new circumstances. In the Bridgehouse gameworld, people help each other heal and learn new skills for living rather than merely surviving.

      Link: <bridgehouse.mystrikingly.com>

      CHUCKLEBERRY COMMUNITY FARM - Canada

      Chuckleberry Community Farm is a Team of inspired, clear-minded individuals creating a relational-centred, regenerative lifestyle that naturally catalyzes the evolution of human consciousness. We are enabling the old paradigm to fade away without fighting. We are allowing a practical yet magical nature to guide our way.

      People come to Chuckleberry not just to learn about sustainability and organic food production. Coming to Chuckleberry is an invitation to relax into all of what you are and all of what you feel. In-house workshops and trainings are available to support you on your journey.

      Link: <chuckleberrycommunity.ca>

      THE COMMONS - Social Change Library

      The Commons Library exists to make social movements smarter and stronger. We are an online library for the change makers of the world and for those interested in social change, activism, advocacy and justice.

      We gather and share resources from many different sources and organisations from all around the world in a user friendly, accessible portal. We also create resources to help change makers stop reinventing the wheel and support them with what they need. At times of crisis and opportunity the librarians gather and distribute relevant resources to assist campaigners and community builders to seize the moment. Our quick response resource recommendations enable change makers to get what they need and jump back into their work quickly. Plus, the Commons team works to make the insights of conferences available to a larger audience for the longer term. The Commons sends out a monthly newsletter filled with resources for social change. It’s a great way to find out about new additions to the library as well as existing content that’s relevant to current circumstances.

      Link: <commonslibrary.org>

      DEEP GREEN RESISTANCE (DGR) - With Derrick Jensen & Lierre Keith

      Our goal is a world where biodiversity is rising, dead zones are shrinking, and land-based cultures grounded in human rights and a sustainable relationship with the planet arise and flourish. In short: a world without industrial civilization, but with you.

      The Deep Green Resistance Blog is here: <deepgreenresistance.blogspot.com>

      Link: <deepgreenresistance.org>

      DISTINCTIONARY

      The Distinctionary is an alphabetical listing of Archan distinctions. These distinctions come from Possibility Management, which is thoughtware for Archiarchy. By incorporating these new terms into your everday conversations, you help upgrade human thoughtware.

      Link: <distinctionary.mystrikingly.com>

      DRAGON DREAMING - From John Croft

      Dragon Dreaming is a world wide open-source interactive networking phenomenon which provides technology and philosophy that assists Activists, informal community projects, NGOs, Government and Business Enterprises to deliver what they want to create in the world. Dragon Dreaming – an easily applied technique pioneered by the Gaia Foundation of Western Australia in order to fulfil its objectives by integrating:

      • personal growth – commitment to your own healing and empowerment
      • community building – strengthening the communities of which you are a part
      • service to the Earth – enhancing the wellbeing and flourishing of all life

      and which for over 25 years, has been used to varying degrees in over 700 successful projects, and is now spreading rapidly across all continents. Dragon Dreaming is a holistic method for the implementation of creative, collaborative, sustainable projects.

      Link: <dragondreaming.org>

      Link: <jdcroft.wordpress.com/about-dragon-dreaming>

      ECOSYSTEM RESTORATION COMMUNITIES

      From the degraded rainforests of Brazil to the arid landscapes of Morocco, Ecosystem Restoration Communities (ERC) is a global movement that harnesses the collective power of individuals and communities to restore our planet’s ecosystems. Real change starts from the ground up, driven by the passion and commitment of local communities. Our movement focuses on empowering people through capacity building, knowledge sharing, and practical training which enables them to implement sustainable restoration practices. Together, we are not only revitalizing ecosystems but also fostering resilience and a deep connection to nature within communities worldwide. Join us in creating a regenerative future, one community at a time.

      Link: <ecosystemrestorationcommunities.org>

      EXTINCTION REBELLION

      Extinction Rebellion is a decentralised, international and politically non-partisan movement using non-violent direct action and civil disobedience to persuade governments to act justly on the Climate and Ecological Emergency. Any person or group can organise autonomously and take action in the name and spirit of XR so long as the action fits within XR’s principles and values . In this way, power is decentralised, meaning that there is no need to ask for permission from a central group or authority. They regularly send out inspiring and hopeful newsletters.

      Link: <rebellion.global>

      FEELINGS PRACTITIONER

      Using the healing power of feelings.

      We are Feelings Practitioners and work with all our bodies: the physical, the mental, the emotional, the energetic and the archetypal body. The emotional body plays a central role, it is decisive in the interplay of all bodies. Emotions are used in their full quality and considered in the context of physical symptoms.

      The practical application of Conscious Feelings is completely innovative and distinguishes our work. Together, we investigate how the repression of feelings leads to symptoms on the one hand, and how the restored - or first-experienced - flow of feelings helps to dissolve these symptoms on the other.

      We empower people to use the emotional body to uncover, release, and transform their own emotional patterns and strategies behind physical symptoms in order to heal effectively.

      We offer individual sessions for people with symptoms, and have developed training courses for therapists to become Feelings Practitioners.

      Link: <feelingspractitioner.org>

      FILMS FOR ACTION

      Welcome to the largest library for social change online. Films For Action is a library for people who want to change the world. Our mission is to empower citizens with the knowledge and perspectives essential to creating a more compassionate, egalitarian, regenerative, and democratic society. Films For Action was founded in 2006 by a few friends in Lawrence, Kansas, after realizing how essential healthy media is to a healthy democracy. (Fun fact: This insight came from watching The Corporation!) Over the last 18 years, we've curated over 1,000 free documentaries, 5,000 videos, and 4,000 articles spanning almost every topic related to changing the world. During this time we've been able to reach over 70 million people - not by owning a TV network or spending truckloads of cash on advertising, but because millions of awesome people keep sharing 'films for action' with their friends on social media - in particular, our 800,000 supporters on Facebook. One of the best things is, our library is 99% free, ad-free, and 100% supported by our patron supporters. We don't accept any government or corporate funding.

      Read: filmsforaction.org/articles/paradigmshifting-documentaries-for-a-wise-earth

      Link: filmsforaction.org

      FLOWERING MOUNTAIN - Martín Prechtel

      My experience has always been if you love something or someone passionately enough you will amplify your heart, eschew ancestral biases, open your mind, train your hands and go to any extent to learn the language of what you love, to comprehend and be comprehended, in order to converse with the Divine in the thing you love. Teaching forgotten things, endangered excellent knowledges, but above all a grand overview of human history as seen from a particular Martín Prechtel way in the search for a comprehension regarding the survival of unique and unsuspected manifestations of the Indigenous Soul in overlooked pockets of peaceful living during isolated times throughout the world as well as the worldwide historical displacement of indigenous people, plant and animal life-ways and the subsequent survival of core vestiges of these deep life and culture respecting understandings that still live in various everyday life styles among many of today’s mixed peoples and ecosystems. A way of hands-on village-style teaching in hopes of developing a language, consciousness and way of living that feeds and gives life to the Indigenous Soul of the Earth whereby scientific discovery working on behalf of a true spirituality of the Holy in Nature could give humans a real usefulness within the whole, instead of a fearful rationalist synthetic flight away from life into depression and extinction.

      Link: <floweringmountain.com>

      FOUNDATION FOR INTENTIONAL COMMUNITY

      At a time when too many of us feel isolated and alone, intentional communities offer more sustainable and just ways of living together. The Foundation for Intentional Community (FIC) has over 35 years of service to a growing movement of people joining and building hundreds of intentional communities around the world. We think human society has the potential to support the wellbeing of all people and the ecosystems of which we are a part, recognizing that the wellbeing of one depends on the wellbeing of all. We face an overwhelming and inextricably intertwined set of challenges. They are all results of mutually reinforcing systems, operating on a global scale, that perpetuate harm and foster violence. They include:

      • Social isolation, division, disconnection, & trauma
      • Inequality, injustice, oppression, & exploitation
      • Climate disruption and ecological system collapse

      Because of their integrated, place-based nature, intentional communities provide unique opportunities to address a variety of issues in a holistic way. As places for sharing lives, resources, land, and purpose, they provide and maximize an interconnected set of ecological, social, and economic benefits.

      As a movement, intentional communities have unfulfilled potential to:

      • Support the wellbeing of the people who live in them
      • Support each other
      • Support the shift the world needs towards cooperation, justice, and resilience

      People need community. Communities need people. People and communities meet at ic.org.

      Link: <ic.org>

      GAIAN ROAD TEAM INTERVIEWS

      We celebrate the amazing success of the Gaian Road Team, and share the wealth of Nonmaterial Value we co-created while journeying together around the world for nine months from 2012 to 2013. The Gaian Road Team was an open ended Quest to weave critical connections between communities of practice to strengthen the system of influence for the emergence of next culture - Archiarchy - the culture that naturally appears as you extract yourself from Patriarchy in the same way a teenager extracts himself from his parents' house to grow up. Archiarchy is centered around ongoing authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes. It thrives on Nonlinear and Unreasonable creative collaboration between initiated adult women and initiated adult men. The Gaian Road Team served as a Seed crystal of Archiarchy, catalyzing change in the human ethnosphere. Archiarchy already exists. More and more Bridges are being established over which you, yourself, can take the 6 steps to Archiarchy. Each person we interviewed is a living bridge to Archiarchy. Happy journeys!

      Link: <gaianroadteam.mystrikingly.com>

      GLOBAL ECOVILLAGE NETWORK

      The Global Ecovillage Network envisions a world of empowered citizens and communities, designing and implementing their own pathways to a sustainable future, and building bridges of hope and international solidarity. Our Mission is: To innovate, catalyze, educate and advocate in global partnership with ecovillages and all those dedicated to the shift to a regenerative world. Our Goals are:

      1. To advance the education of individuals from all walks of life by sharing the experience and best practices gained from the networks of ecovillages and sustainable communities worldwide.

      2. To advance human rights, conflict resolution, and reconciliation by empowering local communities to interact globally, while promoting a culture of mutual acceptance and respect, effective communications, and cross-cultural outreach.

      3. To advance environmental protection globally by serving as a think tank, incubator, international partner organization, and catalyst for projects that expedite the shift to sustainable and resilient lifestyles.

      4. To advance citizen and community participation in local decision-making, influencing policy-makers, and educating the public, to accelerate the transition to sustainable living.

      Link: <ecovillage.org>

      GREEN SCHOOL - Bali

      When you step onto a school campus, what do you want to see, hear, experience and feel? Imagine this, a school without walls, a campus which ignites the senses and the natural curiosity of children, a place where innovation, creativity and learning flourish, a community, which has come together from all corners of the globe to share new experiences, a place of joy.

      Seeing children learning by doing, hearing deep and meaningful student discussions, experiencing daily growth as a whole person and feeling the joy of being part of a vibrant community of learners is the Green School experience. Welcome to your first glimpse of Green School. From wherever you are in the world, We invite you to explore what Green School offers to students, their families, the community and the world. Take a little time to look at all that we are able to share with you here.

      Link: <bali.greenschool.org>

      HOLISTIC LAND MANAGEMENT

      For many years, large areas of grasslands around the world have been turning into barren deserts. This process, called desertification, is happening at an alarming rate and plays a critical role in many of the world’s most pressing problems, including climate change, drought, famine, poverty and social violence. One major cause of desertification is mismanaged agriculture, the production of food and fiber from the world’s land (and waters) by human beings for human beings. In the past, large wild herds of grass-eating herbivores migrated or were compelled to keep moving by the presence of pack-hunting predators, which dominated grassland environments. These herds grazed, defecated, stomped and salivated as they moved around, building soil and deepening plant roots. Over time, the wild herds were largely replaced by small numbers of domestic, sedentary livestock and populations of pack-hunting predators were mostly destroyed. Without the constant activity of large numbers of bunched animals, the biological cycle (birth, growth, death, decay) was interrupted and the grasslands and their once-rich soils turned into dry, exposed desert land. Holistic Management has been successfully implemented on nearly 29 million hectares (75 million acres) across more than 20,000 trained farmers, ranchers, and pastoralists. It is successful because it is a cost-effective, highly scalable, and a nature-based solution. It is sustainable because it increases land productivity, livestock stocking rates, and profits. The Savory Institute trains land managers to use Holistic Management through the accredited educators in our global Hub network, as well as through online courses, ebooks, and other learning materials. Forty years ago, Allan Savory developed Holistic Management, as an approach to help land managers, farmers, ranchers, environmentalists, and policymakers develop strategies for regenerating degraded landscapes and the livelihoods of the people living on them.

      Link: <savory.global/what-is-holistic-management>

      HEART GYM

      Heart Gym is an online or in-person research and practice space to connect with your Emotional Body, come into Experiential Reality, and practice your Basic Inner Navigation Skills (BINS), while honing your ability to Hold Space and create Intimacy.

      Connecting with your Emotional Body requires you to Consciously Feel, which means to feel and distinguish between the 4 Feelings - Anger, Sadness, Fear, and Joy - on purpose. Feelings serve your Being by delivering you energetic information to use to take action in your life for what you care about.

      There are also 4 Emotions that deliver you information about what needs healing that you still carry from your past. You may discover some of these healing doorways in the Heart Gym. While this space is not for processing emotions, it can give you hints of where to go deeper into your healing journey, which can be supported by completing Emotional Healing Processes (EHP).

      If you dare to Consiously Feel, you might think, "I am terrified, I don't know how to do this." This would be one of those healing doorways. If you think, "Oh, it is already easy for me to talk about what I am feeling," it is time to come to Experiental Reality.

      The reality is that talking about your feelings is often a mental exercise to numb and avoid what you are feeling. This is called Verbal Reality, where most people spend their lives out of touch with what is really going on. What is real is to feel what you are actually feeling and let that feeling, which is inside of your Heart, speak. In the Heart Gym, you will practice this skill, alongside other BINS such as lowering your Numbness Bar, distinguishing between the 4 Feelings, distinguishing between the 4 Emotions, Becoming Present with what is, scanning your 5 Bodies, and many more. Welcome to Heart Gym! No fees!

      Link: <heartgym.mystrikingly.com>

      ITM - [INSIDE] THE MOVEMENT

      [INSIDE] THE MOVEMENT is the action toolkit for the climate movement. It's updated every week and it's here for free for you to change the world. So use it! Our mission is to create a global community, one that represents all the organizations, companies and individuals committed to the climate crisis, one large enough to put serious pressure on lawmakers, business owners and anyone in a position of power to act on climate. Once we have this global community, we have a collective voice. And if we want to have any chance of beating the fossil fuel industry and its billions of dollars and all those who are beholden to it, we are going to need that collective voice. We’re a team of climate activists and journalists. We’re the folks at EarthRise, Fossil Free Media, One Earth, The Solutions Project and The YEARS Project. But we’re also just regular people. Which really means we’re you and your neighbor and your friends and your family. We’re anyone and everyone who cares about climate change. Together, we’re the collective billions of people living on this planet who desperately want collective action to stop the climate crisis.

      Link: <itm.earth>

      KHAN ACADEMY

      Every child deserves the chance to learn. Across the globe, 617 million children are missing basic math and reading skills. We are a nonprofit delivering the education they need, for free. Millions of students from all over the world, each with their own unique story, learn at their own pace on Khan Academy every single day. Our resources are being translated into more than 36 languages in addition to the Spanish, French, and Brazilian Portuguese versions of our website. We provide a personalized learning resource for all ages, with practice exercises, instructional videos, and a personalized learning dashboard. Khan Academy empowers learners to study at their own pace, both in and out of the classroom. Covering subjects from kindergarten through early college, including math, science, reading, computing, history, art history, economics, financial literacy, SAT, MCAT, and more, Khan Academy focuses on skill mastery to help learners build the strong foundations they need to succeed in higher education and in their careers.

      Link: <khanacademy.org>

      LINKTREE FOR ARCHIARCHY AND POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT

      This 'tree of links' gives you direct connections to:

      • Possibility Management main thoughtware upgrade trainings website.
      • Archiarchy Creation Village global Telegram group - ask and give possibility, share your Treasure, celebrate your research.
      • PM Events Global - Global Archan Events Telegram group.
      • PM Events Brazil
      • PM Events New Zealand
      • PM Events Portugal
      • PM Events D-A-Ch
      • PM Events Berlin
      • etc.

      Link: <linktr.ee/archiarchy>

      LOCAL FUTURES - International Alliance for Localization

      The International Alliance for Localization (IAL) from Local Futures is a worldwide localization movement and provides a network to support and connect place-based economies and local communities. It unites diverse groups and individuals in both North and South — from business leaders and labor unions to farmers, social justice activists and environmentalists, who share a common vision of localization as a powerful solution multiplier. Over 1700 people and groups from 58 different countries have joined the IAL to date.

      You can watch Helena Norberg-Hodge's eye opening and heartrending 60 minute docu called Learning From Ladak HERE. They share many activities and a persistently positive newsletter.

      Link: <localfutures.org/programs/global-to-local/international-alliance-localization>

      MUSEUM OF PM

      This website does what it can to introduce to you the people, discoveries, inventions, and projects created by applying the wealth of distinctions, tools, processes and thoughtmaps of Possibility Management (PM).

      First we offer ROOTS - the sources providing specific nutrients giving authenticity to the Possibility Management gameworld.

      Next comes SHOOTS - the beginning sprouts of new life, the original creation points of Possibility Management.

      After that comes FRUITS - the abundant diversity of valuable bridges now being co-created by Possibility Manager Teams around the world helping people to make the shift to next culture - Archiarchy - the culture that naturally emerges now that matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course.

      Then we share our HOOTS - us shouting on the rooftops to celebrate those allies and colleagues around the world that we love for doing similar, resonant, or collaborative work as Possibility Management.

      And finally we show you our BOOKS - exploring the adventurous new territories opening up with the clarity and possibilities of Possibility Management.

      Link: <museumofpm.mystrikingly.com>

      ONTREE - Archiarchy Invention Center in New Zealand

      At Ontree, we are the guardians of the land pioneering a cultural shift towards Archiarchy, a new way of relating to each other and the world around us.

      Through collaborative research and experimentation, we are fostering a rapid learning environment where Archetypal Love guides our actions and interactions, creating possibilities for transformation and thriving.

      Link: <ontreecentre.org>

      OPEN SOURCE ECONOGY

      We’re developing open source industrial machines that can be made for a fraction of commercial costs, and sharing our designs online for free. The goal of Open Source Ecology is to create an open source economy – an efficient economy which increases innovation by open collaboration. Are you looking for an alternative to college or a mid-life correction? Become a future builder, builder of the future, and build your own future. Interdisciplinary, complex systems learning in literacy, numeracy, oracy, emotional literacy, and moral literacy that allows you to find or forge your role on this planet. Based on learning how to learn, learning how to think, and learning how to be a human – where you practice by doing and learn by teaching. Join anywhere from a 2 month integrated design trimester, or 4-year Fellowship. Join us as we build an economy of abundance. Find out more.

      Link: <opensourceecology.org>

      OSADA - Archiarchy Invention Center in Poland

      We are living in a time of deepening poly-crisis, possibly leading to the collapse of the world as we know it and the destruction of present life on Earth.

      Our task is to hospice modernity and sow the seeds of a mature culture for future generations. At OSADA we strive to do it wisely and courageously.

      Link: <osada.earth>

      PACHAMAMA ALLIANCE

      Together, We are Healing Ourselves and the Earth. We equip people around the world with inspiration and training to regenerate the planet’s ecosystems, bring justice to their communities, and restore our relationships with the Earth, each other, and ourselves. With roots deep in the Amazon rainforest, our programs integrate Indigenous wisdom with modern knowledge to support personal, and collective, transformation that is the catalyst to bringing forth an environmentally sustainable, spiritually fulfilling, socially just human presence on this planet. Our unique contribution is to generate and engage people everywhere in transformational conversations and experiences consistent with this purpose. We weave together Indigenous and modern worldviews such that human beings are in touch with their dignity and are ennobled by the magnificence, mystery, and opportunity of what is possible for humanity at this time. We are here to inspire and galvanize the human family to generate a critical mass of conscious commitment to a thriving, just and sustainable way of life on Earth. This is a commitment to transforming human systems and structures that separate us, and to transforming our relationships with ourselves, with one another, and with the natural world.

      Link: <pachamama.org>

      PM HEALING VILLAGE

      The global Possibility Mangement Healing Village is nearly 1000 members around the world providing and exchanging advanced 5 Body healing processes with each other. It is not a club, not a co-op, not a business, yet so much Nonmaterial Value is exchanged on a daily basis that it boggles the mind to conceive of. More Value is exchanged than money could pay for. Money is a pitiful and nearly worthless Value in comparison with the Value of clarity, possibility, transformation, 3 Phase Healing, connection, relatedness, intimacy, evolution, and Love that is being effectively, ongoingly, and collaboratively co-created in the PM Healing Village.

      Link: <pmhealingvillage.mystrikingly.com>

      POSSIBILITATOR TRAINING

      Possibilitator Training is a Path, not a program. Gear-up to co-create regenertive culture... one gameworld at a time. What is your piece of the puzzle. How can you deliver it? Together we are healing and transforming our Inner Structures to consciously collaborate with Gaia AND learn the skills of delivering your natural agency.

      Possibilitator Training is a Gaian Gameworld. And... we welcome you here!

      The purpose of Possibilitator Training is to heal and empower each other enough to build out and occupy the infrastructure of next culture - archiarchy - the regenerative cultures that are emerging now that matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course.

      This Path is rich with challenges, deep dives into yourself, authentic connections with highly motivated Team players, learning so many things you never knew you did not know about.

      You will be Upgrading Human Thoughtware starting with your own, delivering Processes for others both on this Path and in life, and becoming Bridges to Archiarchy - 'next culture' - by bringing to life your own Gaian Gameworlds.

      Link: <possibilitatortraining.mystrikingly.com>

      POSSIBILITY BOOKS - Books from the Archan Context

      It is wonderful to read these books together in a Study Group or other Team, either online or offline, and then to enter a sharing and context-deepening space to ask these questions out loud together:

      • How does reading Build Matrix?
      • How useful is reading fiction, as distinct from non-fiction?
      • What is actually happening when I’m reading a StartOver.xyz website?
      • How about when I’m reading an article at Jewels Of Possibility?
      • How does reading make a difference in conscious evolution on Earth?
      • How can I read in a way that feeds all five of my bodies?

      Please be sure to register your book-reading Matrix Points online at the StartOver.xyz platform.

      Link: <possibilitybooks.mystrikingly.com>

      POSSIBILITY COACHING

      Modern western culture, particularly the mental health arts, are saturated in the Jungian / Freudian context of psychoanalysis developed a century-and-a-half ago, aimed at understanding your condition. This intellectual orientation fits perfectly with modern education's overemphasis on 'knowing' as the highest value. It has gone largely unquestioned as the best and proper approach.

      However, during the past fifty years other modalities for optimizing the human condition have been quietly emerging as a result of diverse experimentation and careful note-taking.

      One such form is Possibility Coaching, making use of the transformational forces and practical clarity of the tools, thoughtmaps, distinctions and adulthood initiatory processes of Possibility Management.

      Possibility Coaching originates in a different context from psychoanalysis, and aims at different outcomes. The context of Possibility Coaching is possibility, radical responsibility, and authentic adulthood. The core assertion in the context of Possibility Coaching is that, "Something completely different from this is possible right now." The proof is Possibility Coaching sessions.

      Link: <possibilitycoaching.mystrikingly.com>

      POSSIBILITY COUCHSURFING - Visit Archans Around the World

      Each step of your Journey brought you exactly to where you are now. Were your steps conscious? Or unconscious? Where do you go next? Possibility Couchsurfing reflects who you are becoming on your Path.

      Reveal the subtle changes you notice about your evolutionary experiences at your Possibility Team, during meetings at the Café, and on your Journey. Ask people about what they are discovering, and use Vacuum Learning with questions like these:

      1. What is alive in you in your 5 Bodies?

      2. What do you need now?

      3. Make interesting offers to negotiate so that you AND the others get what they need. This is NOT about compromising! Use your initiated Gremlin to create and go through nonlinear possibility Doorways together with others.

      4. Ask the person across from you the exact questions you would love someone to ask you.

      5. Open up safe spaces for deepening the conversation to explore further.

      This is how to create High Level Fun while Possibility Couchsurfing!

      Link: <possibilitycouchsurfing.mystrikingly.com>

      POSSIBILITY FILMS - Films Related to the Archan Context

      Possibility Films are Inner Navigation Maps. These films are required viewing for any Possibilitators on the Path. Study these films together in a Possibility Team to discuss your experiences and explore invitations to new Possibilities. Please be sure to register your Matrix Points in your free account at the StartOver.xyz platform.

      Link: <possibilityfilms.mystrikingly.com>

      POSSIBILITY SEEDS - Archan Matrix-Building Experiments

      Possibility Seeds are Matrix Building Experiments for Archans, Possibilitators, Edgeworkers, and Riftwalkers to expand your Box, deepen their context, upgrade their thoughtware, develop their spaceholding skills, build Matrix into their Being to catch more consciousness, practice delivering Emotional Healing Processes (EHP), practice building gameworlds, and creating Bridgehouses and Archiarchy Invention Centers (AIC) for themselves and others.

      Possibility Seeds are an Archan Agency Amplification (AAA) resource.

      Link: <possibilityseeds.mystrikingly.com>

      PULSE DER ERDE - Archiarchy Invention Center in Germany

      (translated from the German) Research and dissemination of regenerative lifestyles. We are the ones who plant the seeds in the ground so that our future generations can reap the harvest. Our goal is to train ourselves and others to become responsible individuals who will help transform our planet back into a thriving oasis. One of the fundamental causes of the current misery is based on the illusion that we humans are separate beings from the earth and nature. Although the state of our planet is no secret, we rarely allow all the reports and news about it to truly touch us. And if we allow ourselves to be touched by them, there is a great danger of succumbing to despair and throwing our hands in our laps in resignation. However, neither denial nor resignation will bring about change. We live on a planet where all beings are connected to one another through a global network of relationships. Our concern is to reconnect with the Earth and its living beings and to allow ourselves to be affected by the state of the world that we ourselves have caused, to feel the pain and to use this as fuel to act, to research and experiment on how sustainable coexistence among us humans, but also with the Earth and its living beings, can look and function.

      Link: <pulsdererde.org>

      RAGE CLUB & RAGE CLUB SPACEHOLDER TRAINING

      The purpose of Rage Club is to change your relationship to the feeling and emotion of anger so you can consciously and productively use the energy and information of anger as an adult in your daily life, without being possessed or overwhelmed by it.

      In modern culture we are conditioned to believe that it is not okay to be angry because, “Anger is one of the negative feelings,” and, “Anger is dangerous, loud, embarrassing, uncivilized.” When you learn to own your anger and use it responsibly, you get clarity and can act, protect yourself and avoid creating victim-drama-stories.

      Rage Club is an extremely safe learning environment allowing you to reconnect to the archetypal power and intelligence of your anger.

      The use of conscious adult anger starts when the anger becomes the tool to: say, “No!” or “Stop!” say, “Yes!” (by the way, you can only say yes, if you can say an authentic no, otherwise your yes is a lie), change things, move things, stop things, start things, invent things, get rid of things, make boundaries, answer questions from a resource other than knowing, create clarity, eliminate confusion, commit, keep promises, take action, say what you want, or say what you don’t want... In other words, to do the next amazing thing in your life!

      Link: <rageclub.mystrikingly.com>

      Link: <rageclubspaceholdertraining.mystrikingly.com>

      RESISTANCE RADIO - Part 1 - with Derrick Jensen

      The first 389 audio only videos of Derrick Jensen interviewing activists around the world.

      Link: <youtube.com/playlist?list=PLpXiw313OSyCd3Mw0dnF-bssq2M0mq14q>

      RESISTANCE RADIO - Part 2 - with Derrick Jensen

      Derrick Jensen is author of Bright Green Lies.

      Episode 420, Derrick's 2025/03/10 interview with the 2024/2025 Cavitation Bridgehouse is online at:

      podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/resistance-radio-interview-of-clinton-callahan/id723644446?i=1000698512472

      A huge archive of Derrick's previous Resistance Radio interviews is available at:

      deepgreenresistance.blogspot.com/p/derrick-jensen-resistance-radio-archives.html

      Link: <https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/resistance-radio/id723644446>

      SCHOOL OF LOST BORDERS - Initiation Center in California, USA

      For over 40 years, the School of Lost Borders has provided vision fasts, guide trainings, and other programs that offer initiatory, transformational experiences to those seeking growth, insight, and restoration. Our participants are of various ages, lifestyles, and cultures. Our headquarters are in Payahuunadü, also known as the Owens Valley in California, which is ancestral and contemporary land of the Nüümü and Newe people. Our courses expand from the deserts of California, New Mexico, and Arizona, to the Rocky Mountains, to diverse landscapes across continents. Please visit our Cultural Relations page for more information about the School's commitment to regenerative relationships with people and place. The School of Lost Borders has an organizational model of representational governance that incorporates guides, administration, and Board perspectives in its decision-making and evolving vision.

      Link: <schooloflostborders.org>

      SEA SHEPHERD

      Sea Shepherd’s sole mission is to protect and conserve the world’s oceans and marine wildlife. We work to defend all marine wildlife, from whales and dolphins, to sharks and rays, to fish and krill, without exception. Illegal, unreported, and unregulated (IUU) fishing is one of the largest transnational crimes in the world, generating billions in illicit profits each year and devastating the ocean in ways few other crimes can match. Our remedy is Direct Action; a collaborative model that partners with governments to push back on decades of exploitation and neglect using ships, technology, tenacity and a relentless commitment to hands-on, daily solutions. We fight the poachers, cartels, and industrial trawlers that break the law, that push species to the edge, and our crews and volunteers work to bring their days of devastating the ocean to an end. We are looking for more volunteers to crew on our ships. Is this you?

      Link: <seashepherd.org>

      SEASTEADING INSTITUTE

      'Seasteading' means building startup communities that float on the ocean with any measure of political autonomy. For a 30-second illustration of the mechanism by which seasteads will solve political problems, check out our video: Welcome to The Seasteading Institute. You can also visit our Frequently Asked Questions page. 'Seasteads' are environmentally restorative, since you can’t build a permanent floating structure without providing a home for sea life.

      To learn more about this phenomenon, check out our short videos: Seasteading! Eco-restorative? and Seasteading! Why Not Just Live On a Boat? The Seasteading Institute is a nonprofit organization, based in California.a.

      Link: <seasteading.org>

      SOMOS - Archiarchy Invention Center on Tenerife, Canary Islands

      Somos is a living Invention Centre for Regenerative Culture on Tenerife Island, Canary Islands, Spain. SOMOS is researching and experimenting creating a way of living that is centred on creation, aliveness and evolution. We are not experts, we are experimenters and our quest is to discover what else is possible. We long to live in a way that unifies us with our nature, restoring and enhancing our power and vitality as human beings and the power and vitality of the ecosystems that are our home.

      Link: <somos.land>

      SPACEHOLDER TRAINING

      A one-year professional multi-dimensional Spaceholder Training using the distinctions, thoughtware, and processes of Possibility Management. Before you can successfully build a Gameworld, a Possibility Team, a Heart Gym, and EHP Dojo, a Bridgehouse, a Growness, an Archiarchy Invention Center (AIC), or a Nanonation, you need Spaceholder Skills.

      Link: <spaceholdertraining.mystrikingly.com>

      S.P.A.R.K. EXPERIMENTS

      S.P.A.R.K.s are Specific Practical Applications of Radical Knowledge. The are a couple pages of condensed notes followed by Experiments to try. So many people have told us how much their lives have changed once they started actually doing the S.P.A.R.K. Experiments with their Team.

      Link: <sparks-english.mystrikingly.com>

      (NOTE: At the website you can find flags that link to multiple other S.P.A.R.K. language websites. The best way we found to use S.P.A.R.K.s is in a weekly S.P.A.R.K. Experiment Team!)

      S.T.A.R.R.s - Short Distinction Videos from Anne-Chloé Destremau

      Only a stupid person would think of taking more responsibility. We are already burdened enough, aren't we? Who has time or energy for taking more responsibility? But that is the 'old' kind of responsibility. We are talking about a new kind of responsibility. That is why we spell it with a capital 'R', and why we call it 'Radical Responsibility'. Radical Responsibility is when you regard yourself as the cause of all that has ever happened to you, and all that is happening around you right now. People's first thoughts about taking Radical Responsibility are often accompanied by Emotions of fear, anger, perhaps even sadness.

      We have been trained to regard ourselves as victims of circumstances, victims of other people causing us pain, victims of not enough opportunity... but who trained us? Teachers? Who trained them? Other teachers? What if something completely different from this is possible right now? This website is dedicated to sharing snippets of our lives with you. Not just any snippet... but those startling moments when we try to apply Radical Responsibility. Sometimes it works. Sometimes it doesn't work. That's why we think of these as 'Experiments'. We are Experimenters. Each video we share is a window into a precious moment of our lives. So many precious moments already passed before we figured out that we could share our High Level Fun with you. Now you can try these Experiments too.

      Link: <starrs.mystrikingly.com>

      STARTOVER.XYZ - 600+ Thoughtware Upgrade Websites

      No matter what has happened to you, or where you are, you can start over. No one can start over for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from starting over. You have discovered an entrance to StartOverxyz. The most powerful way to change your circumstances is to change yourself. When you change yourself, the circumstances fall away because they do not fit you anymore. How do you change yourself? You Build Matrix in your Being. How do you Build Matrix in your Being? By actually doing the StartOver.xyz Experiments and not just thinking about what it might be like to do the Experiments in your mind.

      Link: startoverxyz.mystrikingly.com

      Link: howtoplay.mystrikingly.com

      Link: spaceport.mystrikingly.com

      Upload your Matrix Codes to your free account here: login.startover.xyz

      STOP ECOCIDE INTERNATIONAL

      Stop Ecocide International (SEI) is the driving force at the heart of the growing global movement to make ecocide an international crime. Our core work is supporting diplomatic progress and fostering global cross-sector support for this. Positioned at the meeting point of legal developments, political traction and public narrative, we are uniquely placed to track, support and amplify the global conversation. We track, report on, and amplify this legal initiative, which is rapidly being taken up by lawmakers around the world. Our newsletter keeps you informed of our progress.

      Link: <stopecocide.earth>

      STORY OF STUFF

      We know all about the problems — from climate change to income inequality to political corruption. Our movies and other media focus instead on the big, exciting innovations driving the environmental and social change we need, as well as the little things individuals and communities can do to make a difference. We call it ‘Growing Solutions’. We think that dramatically increasing civic participation — not just refining our consumer choices — is the key to unlocking the profound challenges we face. Our campaigns provide diverse, engaging opportunities for our Community members to get involved, from the global level down to where they live and work.ference. We call it ‘Growing Solutions’. We ththat dramatically increasing civic participation — not just refining our consumer choices — is the key to unlocking the profound challenges we face. Our campaigns provide diverse, engaging opportunities for our Community members to get involved, from the global level down to where they live and work.ference. We call it ‘Growing Solutions’. We thinthat dramatically increasing civic participation — not just refining our consumer choices — is the key to unlocking the profound challenges we face. Our campaigns provide diverse, engaging opportunities for our Community members to get involved, from the global level down to where they live and work.

      Link: <storyofstuff.org>

      WORLD LAND TRUST

      World Land Trust (WLT) is an international conservation charity that protects the world’s most biologically significant and threatened habitats. Working through a network of partner organisations around the world, WLT funds the creation of reserves and provides permanent protection for habitats and wildlife. Partnerships are developed with established and highly respected local organisations who engage support and commitment among the local community. For each £100 you can preserve one acre forever. For each £5 you can fund a tree from seed to sapling.

      Link: <worldlandtrust.org>

      YANANTIN - Archiarchy Invention Center in Mexico

      Among the indigenous people of Peru and Bolivia, the union of opposing yet interdependent energies is called yanantin or 'complementary opposites'. Yanantin is an archiarchy invention centre embedded in the abundant nature of Xico, Veracruz, México. It is a village for the evolution of human consciousness and the creative collaboration between the authentically initiated Feminine and the authentically initiated Masculine. It is an evolutionary team grounded in radical responsibility, where each person takes ownership of their reality and creations. In Yanantin, we raise children in village, we heal and empower, experiment and create. Together we are weaving a regenerative culture — uniting ancestral wisdom with modern discovery, in harmony with Gaia and all her beings.

      Link: <yanantin-village.earth>

      ZEGG - Archiarchy Invention Center in Germany

      The combination of living community and educational centre makes ZEGG a special place. In the midst of our social and ecological model project, living and learning are interwoven. Our educational programes impart lived knowledge and offer experiential spaces that combine self-responsibility, touchability, and open communication. In this way, we promote social change - towards more awareness, cooperation and sustainability. Our seminars focus on topics such as communication and social competence, art and ecology, love and relationships and community building.

      Link: <zegg.de>

    • StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code ARCHNEWS.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By accepting, you agree the use of cookies. Learn More

      What Are Cookies?

      Cookies are bits of information (memory files) stored in your browser by sites you visit. As is common practice with almost all websites, this site uses cookie to improve your experience by remembering your preferences and enable other cookie-based features (e.g. analytics).

      Our Cookies

      When you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages or comment forms, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

      In order to provide you with a better experience and remember your preferences, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page.

      Third-Party cookies

      In special cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties like Google Analytics. Third party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

      How To Disable Cookies?

      Most browsers let you to refuse to accept cookies. See your browser Help or Tool for how to do this. Be aware that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this and many other websites you visit. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By continuing we assume you accept the use of cookies.
